title: Array Islemleri
subtitle: Dizi olusturma, siralama, dilimleme.
code:
numbers = [10, 25, 3, 47, 8]
puts "Dizi uzunlugu: #{numbers.length}"

sorted_numbers = numbers.sort
puts "Siralanmis dizi: #{sorted_numbers}"

# Eleman ekleme
numbers << 100
puts "\n100 eklendi: #{numbers}"

# Eleman silme
numbers.delete(3)
puts "\n3 silindi: #{numbers}"

# Dilimleme (slicing)
puts "\nDilimleme:"
puts "Ilk 3 eleman: #{numbers[0, 3]}"
puts "Son 2 eleman: #{numbers[-2, 2]}"
puts "Ters cevrilmis: #{numbers.reverse}"

# select / map / reduce
evens = numbers.select { |n| n.even? }
doubled = numbers.map { |n| n * 2 }
total = numbers.reduce(0) { |sum, n| sum + n }

puts "\nCift sayilar: #{evens}"
puts "2 ile carpilmis: #{doubled}"
puts "Toplam: #{total}"

# Coklu boyutlu array
matrix = [[1, 2], [3, 4], [5, 6]]
puts "\nMatris:"
matrix.each { |row| puts row.inspect }
